transactionalStore.implementation: SQLite WAL with synchronous FULL, foreign keys, checks, and optimistic versions

keywordRetrieval.implementation: SQLite FTS5 trigram index with BM25

semanticRetrieval.implementation: local Ollama query embeddings plus exact cosine over persisted vectors

structuredQuery.implementation: SQL filters, aggregates, provenance, temporal validity, and versioned CRUD

graphTraversal.implementation: versioned temporal edges plus recursive CTE traversal

agentState.implementation: working, core, project, archival, and external state blocks

continuousEvolution.implementation: feedback aggregates, fixed retrieval evals, candidate generation, minimum samples, and rollback contract

encryptedBackup.implementation: SQLite online backup wrapped in AES-256-GCM with Keychain-held key, authenticated manifest, lineage comparison, and fail-closed divergence handling

offlineKeyRecovery.implementation: 2-of-2 XOR shares, separate passphrases, scrypt, AES-GCM, distinct-device custody, drill, import, and rotation

automaticRestore.implementation: authenticated lineage gate, cooperative lease, process inspection, rollback snapshot, atomic replacement, crash journal, integrity verification, and automatic rollback

verifierBackedRouting.implementation: route execution receipts run independent verifiers without shell interpolation, hash evidence, separate unknown attribution and infrastructure failures, and expose collection quality
